name: Featured - AI Lead Qualification with Google Sheets

parameters.subject: High-Quality Lead Alert: {{ $("Lead Capture Webhook").item.json.company }}

values.content: =Analyze this lead and provide a qualification score from 1-100 and qualification status. Lead data: {{ JSON.stringify($json) }}. Consider: company size, budget, decision authority, timeline, and product fit. Return JSON with score, status (Hot/Warm/Cold), and reasoning.

parameters.content:
### Trigger Workflow On Endpoint Activation

Endpoint will receive leads at ```https://n8n.blaiseai.com/webhook-test/lead-qualification```

### AI Lead Scorer

Returns a lead score with reasoning based on provided lead data

❗**Must be updated**


### Prompt
Analyze this lead and provide a qualification score from 1-100 and qualification status. Lead data: {{ JSON.stringify($json) }}. Consider: company size, budget, decision authority, timeline, and product fit. Return JSON with score, status (Hot/Warm/Cold), and reasoning.

### If Router

"True" based on a lead score of 70
